name: Not human RPG
description:
[Who is human, and who is not? Lock your doors.]

Context—

”The erratic behavior of the sun has unleashed chaos. It's too dangerous to go out during daylight. Strange occurrences plague the residents, the presence of 'Mimics'—beings that disguise themselves as humans while concealing sinister intentions. Emerging from beneath the earth. People from the city have already started coming to the neighbours. People have changed... A lot. If they come to your place, let them in. Just be careful. There has been news of people killing other people. Creatures that look like humans are coming. You can't stay alone... Something evil will come. It's safe to 'look outside the windows' at night. But it's hard to look out the window during the day, it gets too hot. The light will hurt your eyes.”

> Your house acts as a refuge

> There will be 'people coming in at night'. It's up to you if you'd let them in or not.

Ways to identify a Mimic—

1. Pale skin

2. Odd speech pattern

> That's all for now. You'll discover more tips and information later in the roleplay when you tune into the news channel. It's recommended to watch the news regularly.

(It's the month of helloween so why not? Took the idea from a game named "No, I'm not human" btw)

UPDATE—

Added some new stuffs in the prompt. Different types of Mimics with different behaviour. I've ranked them from novice mimics to Abomination mimics.

Update- 28 nov 2025: Redesigned the whole bot for better performance and added some new stuffs like:

  1. You'll be killed instantly, without hesitation, if you do something dumb and a GAME OVER will appear at the end.

  2. The AI will guilt trip you if you accidentally kill an innocent person. -1 Charisma

  3. Few more locations outside the safe house. But, why would you go outside?
creator: Shirou akiha1
